title: Grappling Hook Mod
description: This project adds a grappling hook to minecraft
body:
This project adds my made grappling hook to minecraft you can get it like this

with commands (/give)
crafting (1 string 1 iron and 1 iron pickaxe)
taking it from creative inventory

max 100 reach with normal settings 
0.5 sec cooldown

Right click with the grappling hook with your hand to use it

with /gamerule you a´can edit settings of the grappling hook
